start.desc:
A random Pokémon challenges you.
Pick one that can beat it —
then it becomes the next defender.
modal.tie.title: IT'S A TIE!
modal.tie.body: Your Pokémon is eliminated — same stat, no winner. Pick a new one and try again.
modal.homepage.title: GO TO HOMEPAGE?
modal.homepage.body: Your current streak will be lost.
modal.rules.title: HOW TO PLAY
rules.p1: A random Pokémon appears on the left. You must find a Pokémon that beats it in the shown stat category.
rules.p2: If your Pokémon wins, it becomes the new defender next round. Keep winning to build your streak!
rules.p3: If you lose, the enemy Pokémon stays and defends again. Your streak resets to 0.
rules.p4: No Pokémon can be used twice. Once a Pokémon has fought, it disappears from the search list forever.
rules.p5: Goal: get the highest streak possible before running out of Pokémon or losing.
modal.elim.title: ✕ ELIMINATED
auth.err.email_confirm: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.err.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
username.title: CHOOSE YOUR NAME
username.hint: This name will appear on the leaderboard.
lb.title: 🏆 LEADERBOARD
lb.error: Failed to load. Try again later.
lb.empty: No scores yet — be the first!
score.saved: Highest score not beaten. Try beating your score of {0} in the next round!
score.error: ⚠ Could not save score. Check your connection.
privacy.title: PRIVACY NOTICE & CONTACT
privacy.text: PKM Chain-Athon uses Supabase to store your account data (email address and username) and leaderboard scores. This data is only used to run the leaderboard and is never shared with third parties. You can play as a guest at any time without creating an account — no data is stored in that case.
privacy.contact: This game was made by a private person as a hobby project. Pokémon and all related names are copyright © Nintendo, Game Freak, and Creatures Inc. For questions, feature requests, or contact, reach out via jakob.mueller.arbeit@gmail.com or on GitHub.
